question: Give me the artists that have been recorded more than 5 times by Radio France
sparql: SELECT ?artist WHERE { ?recording efrbroo:R20_recorded ?organization . ?organization <http://data.doremus.org/organization/Radio_France> . ?recording efrbroo:R25_performed ?artist } GROUP BY ?artist HAVING (COUNT(?recording) > 5)
execution_result:
Error executing SPARQL query over doremus:
failed to parse input: parse error at position 137 for token . with content '.' (the input most likely does not follow the grammar)
